commentary: Wrapped the fall editorial for Tangerine this week — six dishes, one east-facing window, and a chef who actually let the light do the work. Grateful for clients who trust the frame. Print feature out next month.

Six years solo this month. Still shooting food, still chasing warm window light across Brooklyn kitchens, still learning something every shoot. Thank you to the editors and chefs who keep the work interesting.
Booking restaurant menu reshoots for Q1. Half-day package, 25-shot deliverable, dairy-free-aware on set. DM if your spring menu needs new frames.
